title: athyrium subserratum
intro: Athyrium subserratum, also known as the Serrated Lady Fern or Chinese Lady Fern, is a species of fern in the family Woodsiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion. In herbal preparations, Athyrium subserratum is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
